intro.title: Your Space. Your Ideas. Your Way.
intro.description: Nodex gives you an environment where ideas, plans, conversation, and sharing grow from the same flow of information. Capture anything, then keep it connected as it develops.
intro.features: Turn tasks into projects, add notes for details, discuss tasks and ideas. Nodex can be your task manager, idea hub, collaboration space, journal, social feed, or any blend that fits you.

picker.helper: Pick one highlighted area to begin its guide.

breadcrumbFallback.title: Breadcrumb is not visible right now
breadcrumbFallback.description: Open a thread first, skip this step, or end the guide.

navigation.title: Navigation
navigation.description: Use view tabs and breadcrumbs to move through task contexts.

filters.title: Filters
filters.description: Use include/exclude channel and people filters effectively.

kanban.title: Kanban
kanban.description: Use columns, status lanes, and depth controls to organize work.

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.description: Plan tasks by date and review each day in the detail panel.

navigationSwitcher.title: Switch Views
navigationSwitcher.description: Timeline, Tree, Kanban, Table, and Calendar each show the same tasks from a different angle.
navigationSwitcher.action: Switch to any view to continue.

navigationFocus.title: Open a Thread
navigationFocus.description: Click a post to drill into its subitems, comment on it, or add subtasks.

navigationBreadcrumb.title: Step Back Up
navigationBreadcrumb.description: Breadcrumbs keep track of where you are and let you navigate to broader contexts.
navigationBreadcrumb.action: Use the breadcrumbs to return to the full overview.

filtersRelays.title: Pick Your Spaces
filtersRelays.description: Use the *Spaces* section to choose which spaces are visible. Click the icon of a space to toggle visibility of its posts, or click the name to show its posts exclusively. Colored dots reflect connection status, and the + button opens relay management.

filtersChannels.title: Filter by Channel
filtersChannels.description: Use the *Channels* section to narrow posts by topic. Click a channel name to focus on it, or click the # icon to cycle neutral -> include -> exclude. The hashtag icon to the left of *Channels* clears all channel filters.

filtersPeople.title: Filter by Person
filtersPeople.description: Use the *People* section to focus on who's involved. Click a name to show only content involving that person, or click the avatar to toggle content involving them on or off. The icon to the left of *People* clears all people filters.

filtersSearch.title: Search Across Views
filtersSearch.description: The bar at the bottom narrows visible tasks by text in every view.

filtersHashtagContent.title: Hashtags Inside Posts
filtersHashtagContent.description: Click a hashtag chip in any post to focus on that tag. Clear the tag filter to return to the full list.
filtersHashtagContent.action: Click a hashtag chip in a post.

composeKind.title: Task or Comment
composeKind.description: The kind selector decides whether what you post is a standalone task or a comment on the parent.
composeKind.action: Open the kind selector to continue.

composeInput.title: Write with #Tags and @Mentions
composeInput.description: Use #tags to organize and @mentions to reference people. Included channels are added automatically. Setting a date type makes a task appear on the Calendar; future Start dates are shown as not yet doable.
composeInput.action: Tip: {{alternateModifier}}+Enter submits as the other kind. With autocomplete open, {{alternateModifier}}+Enter or {{alternateModifier}}+click attaches the suggestion as metadata without inserting its text.

navigationNav.title: Switch Views
navigationNav.description: Use the top navigation to move between Timeline, Tree, Upcoming, and Calendar.

navigationBreadcrumb.action: Tap your way back to the root to continue.

filtersOpen.title: Open the Menu
filtersOpen.description: Use the menu to manage spaces, fine-tune filters, and update your profile and settings.
filtersOpen.action: Tap the top-left menu icon to continue.

filtersProperties.title: Edit Your Profile
filtersProperties.description: Open the profile editor to update your username, display name, picture, verified address, and about text.

filtersUse.title: Tune Your Filters
filtersUse.description: Tap space chips to pick spaces, channel chips to cycle neutral -> include -> exclude, and people chips to toggle individuals. Combine them to focus the timeline.

composeCombobox.title: Search and Compose
composeCombobox.description: The bottom bar searches as you type and turns the same text into a task or comment with the submit button.

kanbanColumnsStatus.title: Status by Column
kanbanColumnsStatus.description: To Do, In Progress, Done, and Closed track status. Dragging a card across columns updates its status.
kanbanColumnsStatus.action: Move or open a card to continue.

kanbanCreateInColumn.title: Create in Place
kanbanCreateInColumn.description: The + in a column header creates a task directly with that column's status.

kanbanDepth.title: Choose What to See
kanbanDepth.description: Levels (next to search) toggles between root tasks, limited subtask depths, and leaves-only — tasks with no subtasks of their own.

calendarMonths.title: Scroll Through Months
calendarMonths.description: Months stack vertically — scroll continuously to move through time.

calendarPickDay.title: Pick a Day
calendarPickDay.description: Click any day to load it in the detail panel.

calendarDayPanel.title: The Day Panel
calendarDayPanel.description: Review tasks for the selected date, change their status, and create a new task or event for that day.
